seoTitle: Guerilla Bay vs Guildford West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Guerilla Bay and Guildford West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Guerilla Bay vs Guildford West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Guerilla Bay and Guildford West.
heading: Guerilla Bay vs Guildford West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Guerilla Bay, New South Wales and Guildford West, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Guerilla Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Guildford West (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Guerilla Bay or Guildford West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Guerilla Bay has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Guildford West scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Guerilla Bay scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Guildford West scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Guerilla Bay or Guildford West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Guerilla Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
